entity.label: Ataroth
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town on the border of Ephraim and Benjamin (Josh. 16:2, 7), called also Ataroth-adar (16:5). Now ed-Da’rieh.

nodes.label: Ataroth
nodes.description: A town on the border of Ephraim and Benjamin (Josh. 16:2, 7), called also Ataroth-adar (16:5). Now ed-Da’rieh.

verses.text: And goeth out from Bethel to Luz, and passeth along unto the borders of Archi to Ataroth,
And it went down from Janohah to Ataroth, and to Naarath, and came to Jericho, and went out at Jordan.
